title: Healthcare Bridge Strategy
description: Develop healthcare coverage strategy for the gap between retirement and Medicare eligibility in the recommendations section. Paul retires at 63, Medicare at 65 (2-year gap). Margaret retires at 62, Medicare at 65 (3-year gap, but may have been on Paul's employer plan). Analysis must include: COBRA continuation options and costs, ACA marketplace alternatives with subsidy eligibility analysis (AGI management for premium tax credits), spousal coverage coordination, and cost estimates integrated into retirement income projections. Note that Roth conversion AGI impacts ACA subsidy eligibility—coordinate with Task 6.
